name: Zyanne
roleLine: Sustainable products — water, electricity & gas lanes
bestFor: Electricity or gas efficiency product search
Moving from a deal spotlight to a full catalogue search
story: I’m Zyanne — I help you find sustainable products across water, electricity, and gas lanes. I keep chat light and open the Water Saving Finder, product finder, and related guides when you want to search properly. When a product needs grants, payback, or a full equipment deep dive, I hand you to Andrieus, Vincent, or Artemis.
videoPlaceholder: Intro video coming soon — Zyanne will welcome you here.
proof: Water Saving Finder and product finder portals
Catalog enriched with grants where available

journeys.exampleQuestion: What water-saving products fit a busy restaurant kitchen?

steps.label: Pick the water lane
steps.detail: Taps, dishwashers, and process water — not a generic eco list.

steps.label: Open the finder
steps.detail: Water Saving Finder for search; guide for why it matters.

steps.label: Check funding
steps.detail: Andrieus if schemes apply; Artemis if it’s a larger equipment swap.

journeys.exampleQuestion: Zara showed a spotlight — how do I search similar products?

steps.label: Name the lane
steps.detail: Water, electricity, or gas — keeps results focused.

steps.label: Run product search
steps.detail: Sustainable product finder for catalogue-style browsing.

steps.label: Deep dive if needed

journeys.askPrompt: Help me search sustainable electricity-saving products for hospitality

illustrations.caption: Water Saving Finder — search products for kitchens and premises.
Sustainable product finder — broader catalogue across efficiency lanes.
Water saving guide — why water efficiency matters before you buy.

tips: Say water, electricity, or gas up front — mixed queries are harder to rank.
Finders are for search; chat is for guidance and handoffs.
Ask Zara when you want spotlights, not a full catalogue browse.
outOfScope: I don’t place supplier orders — I help you find and compare sustainable product options on Greenways.
